allowed_differences.A_model: ALLOWED_MODEL_SCALE_DIFFERENCE: Qwen2.5-VL-3B replaces Xkev/Llama-3.2V-11B-cot / Llama3.2 Vision 11B
allowed_differences.B_model: ALLOWED_MODEL_SCALE_DIFFERENCE: Qwen2.5 small LLM replaces meta-llama/Llama-3.1-8B-Instruct
allowed_differences.hardware_parallelism: ALLOWED_MODEL_SCALE_DIFFERENCE: single/small-GPU execution is supported in smoke; full 8-GPU official schedule is not launched by this task

target_defaults.dataset: full LLaVA-CoT-100k prepared Heima JSON, micro subset only under --smoke/--dry-run

official_findings.hidden_extraction: predictor position p-1 due shifted token mask over batch['tokens'][:, 1:]
official_findings.hidden_layer: model.decoder.last_hidden_state after decoder forward; no extra adapter in training script before masking was observed
official_findings.projector: Sequential Linear/ReLU/Linear/Dropout(0.0), per decoder checkpoint path in configs
official_findings.decoder_structure: three stage-specific decoder LoRA checkpoints plus three projector files at evaluation
official_findings.replacement: after embedding lookup, before transformer blocks
official_findings.stage_scripts: official uses multiple numbered YAML configs launched by one shell script, not a single generic run_all.sh

unresolved_deviations: Full LLaVA-CoT-100k prepared JSON/image availability is checked but not downloaded in this task.
VLMEvalKit benchmark integration is represented as a dry-run stage manifest; full benchmark execution is intentionally not launched.
The scaled Qwen implementation uses HF adapters rather than Torchtune Llama model builders for model loading.
